response_constraints: Confirm the durable memory only after memory_add succeeds.
Mention only the stored key and value; do not expose unrelated memories.

arguments.value: audiobooks for fiction and print for reference books

stages.purpose: Add the explicitly durable fact under a new key; the similarly named temporary memory is not a replacement.

state_assertions: memory["library.format_preference"] == "audiobooks for fiction and print for reference books"

memory.library.format_preference.temporary: audiobooks for fiction and print for reference books for the current request only

prompt: Remember for future library requests that I prefer audiobooks for fiction and print for reference books.
